(What you observed. Steps to reproduce. Expected vs. actual. Environment.)

(Root-cause hypothesis if any, and the fix shape you have in mind.)

## Out of scope

(Adjacent issues found while investigating, if any.)

## Relationship to other issues

(Linked or duplicate issues, by `#NN`.)
